description_long: This object is a cylindrical bottle of CBD Face & Eye Moisturizer Cream from Complete Hemp, featuring a deep purple body with white text and a white cap. The front displays the product name and key features in bold, easy-to-read fonts, while the back and sides are densely covered with detailed product information, directions, and ingredient lists in smaller white text. The cap is smooth, opaque, and likely made of plastic, fitting snugly over the dispensing mechanism. The bottle is compact and designed for easy handling, with a sleek, modern appearance suitable for personal care use. The graphics are minimal, focusing on text and branding rather than decorative patterns. The overall finish is glossy, giving the bottle a clean and polished look.
description: A sleek, cylindrical purple and white bottle of CBD Face & Eye Moisturizer Cream with a glossy finish and detailed text-based graphics.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Complete Hemp branding, product name, and key features in bold white text on a purple background.
description_view_1: The back view reveals dense white text with directions, ingredients, and regulatory symbols, covering most of the purple surface.
description_view_2: This side view continues the detailed product information and includes additional regulatory and barcode graphics at the bottom.
description_view_3: This angled view shows the transition between the dense text and the front label, with a visible QR code and more instructions.
